label: Experiences at Indiana Dunes National Park

Lake Michigan, Indiana dunes, April 2024. The brown/amber water near the beach is the tannic water of Dunes Creek, which enters the lake near where this photo was taken.

The Indiana Dunes National Lakeshore runs for nearly 25 miles along the southern shore of Lake Michigan, Indiana. Large sand dunes, which have taken thousands of years to form, rise nearly 200 feet above the lake. #indiana #lakemichigan #photography

Stormy gray skies hang over Indiana Dunes at the Indiana Dunes National Lakeshore. The national lakeshore runs for nearly 25 miles along the southern shore of Lake Michigan, in Beverly Shores, Indiana. #lakemichigan #travel #explore

My latest post: A Hike on the Dunes, Indiana Dunes National Park.

Looking out over Lake Michigan from Indiana Dunes. This is from the top of a dune I reached from a little spur trail off the Cowles Bog trail. You can just barely see the Chicago skyline. 2018 #ParkChat #NationalParks #hiking #wanderlust

A9. I grew up near Indiana Dunes National Park. I can still remember my stomach leaping when we crested the hill and viewed Lake Michigan from the road. My now-husband and I climbed Mt. Tom and picnicked there. Great memories! #parkchat www.nps.gov/indu/index.htm
"Indiana Dunes National Park - no. ii" - Photographed in 2025 on the southern shore of Lake Michigan just east of Gary, Indiana #dune #shadow, #nature #trees

Indiana Sand Dunes National Park in Indiana. On clear days, you can see Chicago out in the distance here! Some dunes in this park reach almost 200ft tall! #indianasaddunesnationalpark #nationalparks #indiana #chicago #sanddunes #landscapes #lakemichigan

I'm back today to share a beautiful slice of summer from #IndianaDunesNationalPark. 🌅 More from #IndianaDunes to come, but until then, consider planning your own trip to this peaceful national park! Michigan friends, it makes such a great day trip! #beachlove
#lakeside

Dunes Highway / Route 12 is one of the most scenic highways in the Great Lakes, acting as a gateway to so many gorgeous natural sites and communities in the Indiana Dunes. But please drive safe & drive sober! Observe the greenery in the car, and wait to consume the green when you get home.

Breathtaking beauty of the dunes and West Beach in Indiana Dunes National Park. #IndianaDunesNationalPark #WestBeach #LakeMichigan #IndianaDunes #NationalPark #NatureLover #Travellndiana #Midwest #BeachDay #OutdoorAdventure #Visitlindiana #Nature #NPS #FindYourPark #Indiana #Beach #Dunes #Summer

Happy b-day Indiana! While people may think you're an enormous corn wasteland, you and I both know that the #IndianaDunes have the best beaches (and forests, savannas, meadows, & wetlands) to be found.

Indiana Dunes National Park in northern Indiana, on Lake Michigan. That makes 36 National parks for me!

You'd like Indiana Dunes National Park because you can get a great view of how the government is trying to smite Lake Michigan. Right next to the plant is an oil refinery AND a steel mill. Sit on the beach facing right and you can see where they dump shit into the water. Enjoy the lake's demise!

#parkchat A3: There was a tiny beach at the Tremont Institute in the Great Smoky Mountains I already visited this summer. Later in the summer, I’ll get to go to the beaches of Lake Michigan at the Indiana Dunes National Park. Both of my beach adventures this summer are through #STEAMinthePARK

Indiana Dunes National Park! We climbed up and down 490 stairs to West Beach, felt the waters of Lake Michigan on our feet, and meandered through the Great Marsh Trail. #roadtrippin #adventure #travelingbeerbellies #travellbug #saveournationalparks #indianadunesnationalpark #indiana
A photographer from Dyer has been capturing changes to the Indiana Dunes and dunes along the Lake Michigan shoreline in neighboring Michigan for nearly six decades.
Noon at the Lake yesterday. What is a steel mill doing in my rear-view mirror? #LakeMichigan #GreatLakes #Indiana #NorthwestIndiana #HoosierTwitter #HoosierSky Indiana Dunes National Park/Lakeshore

Black bears used to inhabit Indiana's Lake Michigan shoreline before humans drove them off. Over the last ~15 years, several bears from neighboring states have wandered into Indiana. Including a couple from MI. Bears could definitely re-establish residency at Indiana Dunes NP in Porter County.
Wave Upon Wave with the Waters of Lake Michigan (Indiana Dunes National Park) #IndianaDunes #Indiana #NPS #findyourpark #NikonD850 flic.kr/p/2psS4GM
What do you do when you have a few free hours in Valparaiso Indiana? Well, you head to Indiana Dunes National Park! Lake Michigan is gigantic, BTW.

The elevation of the Indiana Dunes National Lakeshore to the Indiana Dunes National Park has further driven up visitation along the South Shore of Lake Michigan. A developer hopes to capitalize on the growing tourism demand.
I love Lake Michigan. Seen it from Ohio, Indiana, Michigan, Illinois and Wisconsin. Love the dunes in Indiana.

Finally got a chance to check out Indiana Dunes National Park. It is quite the sight when it's not crowded with people for the summer. Lake Michigan is blue like the Caribbean Sea. Don't believe me? Check out my photos here- fineartamerica.com/profiles/2-v...

Within sight of Chicago, a beachy getaway is just a drive away. Best of all, this beach is a protected national park. Indiana Dunes National Park protects 15 miles of Lake Michigan and offers over 1.500 native plants. It is also a haven for birds and sunbathers. www.carfulofkids.com/things-to-do...
Indiana Dunes, Lake Michigan, New Buffalo. On a gem of a summer day. Really enjoyed it.

Best part of Indiana (Indiana Dunes National Park, great for both day trips and camping) is along Lake Michigan an hour’s train ride from Chicago and has a direct station if you use the South Shore train line (shares the same tracks as the commuter METRA rail)
Miller Beach, Indiana is a neighborhood of Gary on Lake Michigan with sandy beaches, Indiana Dunes trails, local dining, and easy access from Chicago.
Cat crossing in Beverly Shores, #Indiana, near Indiana Dunes #NationalPark

Crealock37 Things to Know Indiana Dunes National Park is worth visiting because it offers a rare mix of Lake Michigan beaches, tall sand dunes, and surprisingly diverse ecosystems in one compact destination. crealock37.wordpress.com/2026/04/27/i...

The Calumet Region includes Gary, Indiana (pop 67,000) and the Indiana Dunes (Indiana Dunes State Park, Indiana Dunes National Park, and lots of private property). It’s also home to more than 1,500 species of plants. 🌱 #indianadunes #indiana #lakemichigan

Grasses and wildflowers hiding fauna of many kinds.
Sand soft between toes—
Breeze soft between hairs.
listen and walk with me to see what's over the Sanddune. Lake Michigan home sweet home Gary, Indiana.

At the time, the Dunes was an area of aggressive development. A booming steel industry needed access to Lake Michigan’s waters for cooling towers, importing raw supplies, and exporting refined metal. People always want a piece of .bsky.social…

Beaches along Lake Michigan in Gary, Northwest Indiana, and Chicago have experienced elevated levels this summer. gary.capitalbnews.org/gary-ecoli-l...

Scrapbook Resources in Indiana Welcome to Scrapbooking in Indiana! From Hoosier hills to the shores of Lake Michigan, Indiana offers a mix of quiet small towns and vibrant cities. Whether you’re cropping in Indianapolis, discovering hidden shops in Nashville (Brown County), or retreating at a…
Michael McColly walked along the coast of Lake Michigan 63 miles from Chicago's North Side to the Indiana Dunes, writing a book about his journey.

February 15th marks the anniversary of Indiana Dunes National Park, where sand dunes rise above the shores of Lake Michigan & diverse ecosystems flourish 🌾🌊 Learn more about the Dunes’ story, its rich biodiversity, and why it holds a special place in the National Park System. bit.ly/best-things-...
Hop in the car, and in around an hour you can be climbing the dunes and basking on the shores of Lake Michigan at Indiana Dunes National Park.

Along the southern shore of Lake Michigan, Indiana Dunes National Park blends towering sand dunes, quiet forests, and wide open beaches into one constantly changing landscape. It is a place where the Midwest feels a little wilder, and the horizon stretches just a bit farther.
The Dunes Birding Tower offers sweeping views of Lake Michigan and some of the best migration watching in the Midwest.

Took a day trip to Indiana Dunes National Park. Did not expect to find five 1933 World’s Fair homes floated across Lake Michigan by barge — one with a built-in aircraft hangar.
